name: Robin DL7S Profile

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C9F1E863-8A41-4899-9A32-FB3E71A1A9B5

comment: The DL7S Profile is the first DL range fixture to receive a powerful new 800W version of the LED engine with seven colours for unprecedented smooth, stable and even colour mixing and a very high CRI.

capabilities.comment: Disabled blackout while gobo wheels moving
RoboSpot disabled except faders and PT
Theatre mode - fan noise control from min to max
Colour mixing mode 7 colours On (mode 3 and 4 only)
Colour mixing mode 7 colours Off (mode 3 and 4 only)
Output uniformity On ( at selected CRI - (DMX values 151 - 155))
Filter 281 (Three Quarter CT Blue) (Three Quarter CT Blue)
Filter 285 (Three Quarter CT Orange) (Three Quarter CT Orange)
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
White Point Off (CTC+Green Cor+Virtual ColWheel deactivated)
Crossfade (crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix)
Ramping from open to full position max
Ramping from open to full position min
Ramping from open to half position max
Ramping from open to half position min
Ramp from half position to full position max
Ramp from half position to full position min

capabilities.effectName: Random gobo selection by audio control
Auto random gobo selection from fast to slow
Auto random gobo selection from fast to slow

capabilities.comment: Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow
Random strobe from slow to fast
Ramping from open to full position max
Ramping from open to full position min
Ramping from open to half position max
Ramping from open to half position min
Ramp from half position to full position max
Ramp from half position to full position min

capabilities.effectName: Random gobo selection by audio control
Auto random gobo selection from fast to slow

gwSpecs.description: The DL7S Profile is the first DL range fixture to receive a powerful new 800W version of the LED engine with seven colours for unprecedented smooth, stable and even colour mixing and a very high CRI.
